features: Removes more plague than a regular manual toothbrush
Helps you reach your back teeth
Designed to reach deep and help clean hard-to-reach places
Oral-B, #1 toothbrush brand used by dentists worldwide
description: Product Description Oral-B complete clean manual toothbrush cleans hard-to-reach places for even better plaque removal. Gently cleans all the way to the back of the mouth. Ingredients Glycerin, Hydrated Silica, Sodium Hexametaphosphate, Propylene Glycol, PEG-6, Aqua, Zinc Lactate, CI 77891, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Aroma, Sodium Gluconate, Chondrus Crispus, Trisodium Phosphate, Stannous Fluoride, Sodium Saccharin, Xanthan Gum, Limonene, Silica, Sodium Fluoride, CI 74260 Directions Brush twice a day for two minutes, using a pea-sized amount of toothpaste, brush gently in a circular motion, replace the toothbrush every three months. Safety Warning Do not leave the brush within reach of small children. Replace the brush when worn out. Manufacturer Contact Information Distributed by Gillette UK Ltd, London, TW7 5NP. www.oralb.com See more
